settings.title: Settings
onboarding.title: Shachiku Initialization
onboarding.desc: Setup and personalize your autonomous AI agent companion
onboarding.step1Desc: Select the underlying LLM engine for your agent
onboarding.noModels: No models available - Verify API Key first
onboarding.step2Desc: Give your agent a unique name, personality, and role.
onboarding.personalityDesc: Describe how the agent should communicate.
onboarding.roleDesc: What is the agent's professional or social purpose?
onboarding.languageDesc: The language the generated soul should be in.
onboarding.step3Desc: We've generated a comprehensive system prompt based on your inputs. You can modify it if needed.
onboarding.step4Desc: Optionally bind your agent to a Telegram Bot for mobile chat access.
onboarding.tgTokenDesc: Get this from @BotFather on Telegram. You can skip this.
onboarding.tgUsersPh: e.g. user1,user2 (leave blank to allow all)
onboarding.tgUsersDesc: Comma-separated list of Telegram handles to restrict access.
dashboard.title: Token Usage Dashboard
dashboard.noDataDesc: Token usage data could not be loaded. Please ensure the agent has executed tasks.
dashboard.tableDesc: A breakdown of the total tokens consumed per task.
chat.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear short-term chat memory?
chat.title: Agent Conversation
chat.empty: History is currently empty. Start typing to send your first message to the agent.
chat.placeholder: Type your message to the agent...
memory.title: Memory Logs
memory.desc: Monitor your agent's memory storage, semantic search indexing, and context retrievals.
memory.longTermDesc: Semantic facts automatically extracted and stored by the agent
memory.empty: No long-term memories have been stored yet.
skills.title: Agent Skills
skills.desc: Functions and dynamic skills the agent can execute during reasoning loops. Ask the agent via chat to create new skills.
skills.emptyDesc: Define the first set of functional schema tools before executing your core intelligence pipeline.
skills.name: Name
skills.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the skill '{{name}}'?
tasks.title: Executed Tasks
tasks.desc: A log of tasks that the agent has generated and attempted to execute.
tasks.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to delete all tasks?
tasks.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
tasks.emptyDesc: Instruct the agent via chat to execute a specific task, and it will appear here.
tasks.name: Name
tasks.logsDesc: Execution history and outputs for this task.
tasks.noLogs: No execution logs found for this task.
settings.systemSettingsDesc: Configure LLM provider, validate API key, and select model.
settings.apiKeyVerifyText: Your key will be verified in the next step to fetch available models.
settings.maxThinkingDesc: Limit the number of background tool executions the agent can make in a single run.
settings.telegramTokenDesc: If configured, the agent will reply to messages sent to this Telegram bot.
settings.allowedUsersDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed Telegram usernames. Leave empty to allow any user.
onboarding.errorGeneratingSoul: Error generating soul. Please check your connection.
setupAuth.title: Admin Setup
setupAuth.desc: Set up an admin username and password.
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API Key provided. Please check your credentials.
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your internet or proxy settings.
errors.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required to fetch models.
errors.openaiError: Failed to verify OpenAI API Key:
errors.geminiError: Failed to verify Gemini API Key:
settings.discordTokenDesc: If configured, the agent will reply to messages sent to this Discord bot.
settings.allowedDiscordUsersDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed Discord usernames or User IDs. Leave empty to allow any user.
onboarding.discordTokenDesc: Get this from Discord Developer Portal. You can skip this.
onboarding.discordUsersPh: e.g. user1,user2 (leave blank to allow all)
onboarding.discordUsersDesc: Comma-separated list of Discord handles/IDs to restrict access.
